working_tree: implementation diff was committed unchanged as git_revision after measurement
protocol: One production minizip-ng DEFLATE level 6 source fixture with 1,000,000 numeric cells; four public WorkbookEditor Patch cases; one warm-up followed by three measured runs per case. The actual run nearest the total_editor_ms median is representative, with the earliest run breaking ties. openpyxl checks only the representative workbook after benchmark process timing.
peak_memory_metric: Windows PROCESS_MEMORY_COUNTERS.PeakWorkingSetSize for each benchmark process; source WorkbookWriter fixture generation runs in a separate process
byte_accounting_metric: ZIP central-directory logical file_size and compressed compress_size. Copy-original entries require equal source/output CRC and logical size; source/output compressed sizes are reported separately and do not claim raw compressed-byte passthrough.

source_report.sanitization: The tracked matrix report removes local absolute paths, commands, stdout and stderr while retaining all measured performance metrics, statistics, output-plan entry classification, byte accounting and representative verification.

scope: Single Windows/MSVC machine, one 1,000,000-cell dataset and DEFLATE level 6. Supports only the recorded Patch scenarios; it is not a cross-machine, arbitrary-workload or generalized performance claim.
